prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document addresses healthcare-related topics including patient information resources and vaccine supply, which are relevant to the healthcare systems in England. The mention of specific scheduling and ordering information implies it is most applicable to practices operating within the framework of the NHS in England.
